title: draba olympica var. heterocoma
intro: Draba olympica var. heterocoma, also known as Olympic draba, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits associated with Olympic draba include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Olympic draba can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and stems to create a tincture or salve.
